zh.lifeSummary: William Sulney是Alveridus De Solney的兒子，於1270年出生在英國。他於大約1305年與Sibilia De Bagot在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1340年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Sulney是Alveridus De Solney的儿子，于1270年出生在英国。他于大约1305年与Sibilia De Bagot在英国英格兰斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1340年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sulney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sunley Hill in Kirkdale (North Yorkshire). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Sunnólfr + Old Norse haugr ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: William Sulney was born in 1270, in England as the son of Alveridus De Solney. He married Sibilia De Bagot about 1305, in Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1340, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sulneyは1270年にイギリスでAlveridus De Solneyの息子として生まれた。約1305年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアバゴト'ス ブロムリーでSibilia De Bagotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1340年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sulney(은)는 1270년 영국에서 Alveridus De Solney의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 바고트'스 브롬리에서 Sibilia De Bagot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Sulney nasceu em 1270, em Inglaterra filho de Alveridus De Solney. Ele casou-se com Sibilia De Bagot aproximadamente 1305, em Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1340, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Sulney родился в 1270 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Alveridus De Solney. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilia De Bagot около 1305 г. в местности багот'с бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1340 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
